---
title: "progress-report-EwanFarnum.Rmd"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)

url <- "https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2026.shtml"

page <- read_html(url)
tables <- page %>% html_table(fill = TRUE)

hof <- tables[[1]]

names(hof) <- as.character(hof[1, ])
hof <- hof[-1, ] 


```

```{r}
hof_clean <- hof %>%
 select(Name, Votes, `%vote`, Yrs) %>%
  rename(
    percent = `%vote`,
    Years = Yrs
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Name = str_remove(Name, "^X"),
     Name = str_remove(Name, "-"),
    Votes = as.numeric(Votes),
    percent = as.numeric(str_remove(percent, "%")),
    Years = as.numeric(Years),
    Inducted = ifelse(percent >= 75, "Y", "N")
  )
```
